summary: A vertical clip showing scans of a state legislative bill with large white burned-in captions overlaid across the bottom, plus a circular Libs of TikTok logo in the upper right corner. The document pages are headed STATE OF COLORADO, HOUSE BILL 26-1322, and A BILL FOR AN ACT CONCERNING CIVIL ACTIONS AGAINST CERTAIN INDIVIDUALS ENGAGING IN CONVERSION THERAPY EFFORTS, with sponsorship and bill-summary text below. The captions read phrases such as also called the Civil Actions for Conversion Therapy Survivors Act and Parents and counselors are now the ones who must prove they didn't cause harm.

script.scene: Scan of the bill's first page headed STATE OF COLORADO and HOUSE BILL 26-1322 with a caption naming the act.
Continued scroll through the sponsorship and bill-summary sections with captions about parents and counselors.

notable_text: STATE OF COLORADO; HOUSE BILL 26-1322; A BILL FOR AN ACT CONCERNING CIVIL ACTIONS AGAINST CERTAIN INDIVIDUALS ENGAGING IN CONVERSION THERAPY EFFORTS; Civil Actions for Conversion Therapy Survivors Act; Libs of TikTok
